message:
🐛 Fix settings sidebar scrolling back to top on nav click (#2258)

The sidebar navigation menu would scroll back to the top when clicking
items further down the list. Fixed by:

1. Making the sticky sidebar independently scrollable with max-height
   and overflow-y-auto
2. Adding data-settings-nav attributes to nav buttons for targeting
3. Using scrollIntoView({ block: 'nearest' }) after nav clicks to
   keep the clicked item visible in the sidebar viewport

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
